name: Vault Hunter's Relic
description: Vault Hunter's Relic is a unique Eridian relic for Borderlands 2. It was awarded through Borderlands 2 pre-order/Premiere Club bonuses and is also included with the Mechromancer Pack.
notes: Effects stack in co-op when multiple players have one equipped. Its loot modifier cannot roll higher or lower than the standard value. It cannot normally be traded or dropped. If you swap it for a relic on the ground while your inventory is full, it can vanish. If lost, make a new character to obtain another, then transfer it via Claptrap's Secret Stash in Sanctuary.

special.description: Improves the odds of finding uncommon and rarer items by reducing the weighting of common (white) drops. Each equipped Vault Hunter's Relic cuts common-drop weight by 60%, indirectly boosting all higher rarities; the benefit diminishes at the very top end. This stacks per relic on the team. Weight divisor: 1.0 + (0.6 * number of players wearing the relic).

abilities: Increased chance of enemies dropping rare loot. ZAIBioN 4
